political.s: FEC: $11K PAC donations; 27% to Republican, 73% to Democratic committees.  [CA CalAccess + NY COELIG + TX Ethics adds state-level totals.]

labor.s: 8 federal penalties totaling $112.6M since 2000 (Violation Tracker). Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 51/100; CHRB 18/26; UK MS statement.

charity.s: $50M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.09% of revenue) via Intel Foundation. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #7 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Drucker Institute Management Top 250 — ranked #11 (2024) on customer satisfaction, employee engagement, innovation, social responsibility, and financial strength. Fortune World's Most Admired Companies — ranked #24 (2024). Newsweek Most Trustworthy Companies in America — ranked #33 (2024). Operates the Intel Foundation: $28.6M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).

environment.s: environmental violation: $174K in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

dei.s: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #7 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

privacy.s: CISA Known Exploited Vulns: 2 CVEs on record (0 in past 12mo, 1 used in ransomware); affected products include Ethernet Diagnostics Driver for Windows, Active Management Technology (AMT), Small Business Technology (SBT), and Standard Manageability.

wiki.keyPeople: Robert Noyce, Gordon Moore, Andrew Grove
wiki.extract: Intel Corporation is an American multinational technology company headquartered in Santa Clara, California. It designs, manufactures, and sells computer components such as central processing units (CPUs) and related products for business and consumer markets. Intel was the world's third-largest semiconductor chip manufacturer by revenue in 2024 and has been included in the Fortune 500 list of the largest United States corporations by revenue since 2007. It was one of the first companies listed on Nasdaq.

cases.caseName: Mobility Workx, LLC v. Intel Corporation
Wasserman v. Seer Intel Holdings, Inc.
Cloud Tank, Inc. v. Intel Corporation

health.s: 7 CPSC recalls (6 in past 24 months); latest hazard: the beard growth serum contains minoxidil.

governance.s: Wikidata: owned by BlackRock; HQ Santa Clara. (Wikidata Q248)

sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was performing work inside an exterior pipe chase when he began experiencing symptoms consistent with heat exhaustion, including light-headedness, nausea, and overheating. After resting and cooling down for approximately 20 minutes, he was hospitalized for heat exhaustion and kidney injury resulting from dehydration.

sampleRecords.event_description: Compressed or pinched by shifting objects or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was pushing a steel floor post onto a saw horse when his left hand was pinched between the post and the saw horse, resulting in an amputation to his left little finger.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery, n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On October 6, 2022, an employee was conducting preventive maintenance on a v-belt conveyor when the adjacent conveyor started. That conveyor's roller caught a rag used for cleaning and pulled in the employee's left arm. His ulna and radius were both broken.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during regular operation
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was forming a three-bend part on a brake press. The employee was guiding the part when it folded upward and pinched their fingers against the face of the die. The employee suffered fractures and lacerations to the right index, middle, ring, and little fingers.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by or caught in swinging door or gate
sampleRecords.final_narrative: A temporary employee was attempting to close the door of a trailer when they sustained a partial amputation of their left index finger.

sampleRecalls.title: RootStim Recalls Beard Growth Serum Spray Bottles Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Child Poisoning; Violate Mandatory Standard for Child-Resistant Packaging
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves RootStim Beard Growth Serums spray bottles. The serums come in black boxes with orange and white lettering and have an orange mustache icon on its front panel. The boxes have "Beard Growth Treatment" and "5% Minoxidil - Biotin & Rice Water" printed on its front, directions and warnings printed on …
hazards: The beard growth serum contains minoxidil, which must be in child-resistant packaging, as required by the Poison Prevention Packaging Act. The serum's packagin…

sampleRecalls.title: Ningbo Tianqi Electronic Recalls FUFU&GAGA Murphy Wall Beds Due to Impact and Laceration Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves FUFU&GAGA white wood frame queen size Murphy wall beds. The beds are designed to be wall-mounted and can fold into a cabinet. The wall beds measure about 86 inches high and 65 inches wide. The model number is KF210284US-01MH-A001 and can be found on the instruction booklet and packaging.
hazards: During assembly or disassembly, the 215-pound frame of the wall bed can fall onto consumers, posing deadly impact, crush, and laceration hazards.
injuries: The firm has received two reports of the wall beds falling during assembly when the wall beds were not anchored to the wall, resulting in two injured consumers. One consumer sustained a laceration, a…
products: FUFU&GAGA White Wood Frame Queen Size Murphy Wall Beds

sampleRecalls.title: Aiper Seagull Pro Cordless Robotic Pool Vacuum Cleaners Recalled Due to Burn and Fire Hazards; Distributed by Shenzhen Aiper Intelligent Co.
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Aiper Seagull Pro cordless robotic pool cleaners with model number ZT6001. The recalled pool vacuum cleaner weighs approximately 24 pounds and measures about 19.5 x 18.5 x 15 inches. The "Aiper" brand name is printed on the top/front of the dark gray pool vacuum cleaners. The model name and the se…
hazards: The recalled pool vacuum cleaner has a large current adapter that can overheat, posing burn and fire hazards.
injuries: The firm has received 19 reports of the recalled pool vacuums melting, smoking or catching on fire while charging causing five incidents of property damage. No injuries have been reported.
products: Aiper Seagull Pro ZT6001 cordless robotic pool cleaners
units: About 32,660 (In addition, about 2,530 were sold in Canada)
